visual_analysis: The visual quality is below average due to a lack of detail and overall design polish. While the colors used are harmonious, the layout is too sparse, lacking information and interactive elements that would engage users. The title is clear, but the text's overall presentation feels generic and uninspired, with insufficient visual hierarchy to draw attention to essential parts of the application.
educational_analysis: The educational quality is also basic, presenting a concept (time complexity visualization) without sufficient context or explanation. There is no visible instructional design or learning support. The core concept is present but lacks clear objectives or pedagogical strategies, making it difficult for learners to engage meaningfully with the content. Users may struggle to understand how to use the visualization effectively without additional guidance.
